column3: A digital dataset produced as the output of a scientific or technical observation event. Covers the full range of digital outputs in heritage science including images, spectra, elemental maps, numerical datasets, and documentary records. May incorporate individual file records or grouped collections of files. Versioning is supported via a version number and links to related dataset versions.
Document Note: Data Set Model Overview

column1: Document Note: Data Set Model Overview
column3: This model records a digital dataset produced by a heritage science observation event. It captures identification, description, dataset typing, rights and access conditions, version information, and links to constituent file records or file groups. Links back to the generating observation event and optionally to a method or protocol document. Raw-to-processed dataset relationships are not modelled here; these will be handled by a future data_processing event model or resolved at the digital_file level.

The observation or examination event that produced this dataset. Provides upstream provenance linking the dataset to the observed entity, the responsible actors, and the equipment and methods employed.
The person or organisation that holds rights over this dataset. Multiple rights holders are permitted to accommodate collaborative or jointly-owned resources.
The method or protocol document describing the procedure used to produce this dataset. Provides fuller procedural detail beyond the technique type classification recorded on the dataset itself.
A document referencing or providing context for this dataset, such as an analytical report, condition report, or publication.

column1: D1: File Group or File Record
column3: A digital file group or individual file record incorporated within this dataset. File groups may be nested and may themselves incorporate further file groups or individual file records. Individual file records are defined in the digital_file model.

column1: //links D1: File Group or File Record --> digital_file

column3: Another version of this dataset, or a related dataset from which this one was derived. Relationship direction and ordering are established via the version number or creation date rather than the property direction.
E42: Persistent Identifier (PID)
A globally unique and persistent identifier for this dataset, such as a DOI, ARK, or handle. Supports citation and long-term discovery.
E41: Unique System Label or ID

column1: E41: Unique System Label or ID
column3: Required within some documentation or database systems, such as ResearchSpace required label.

column1: E41: Unique System Label or ID
column3: Automatic: Preferred TBC
E35: Dataset Title
A human-readable title for this dataset, suitable for display in interfaces and publications.
E42: Repository Record URL

A URL pointing to an external repository record for this dataset, such as a Zenodo, B2SHARE, or institutional repository deposit. Use where the dataset or a copy of it has been deposited externally. Distinct from the preferred PID.
E55: repository record
E73: Description
A concise description or abstract of the dataset content, scope, and any notable features relevant to its interpretation or reuse.
E55: Dataset Type

The type of data output represented by this dataset (e.g., XRF spectrum, Raman spectrum, FORS spectrum, EDS map, multispectral image stack, X-radiograph, IRR image, numerical dataset, documentary record).
E55: Technique Type

The analytical or imaging technique used to produce this dataset at a summary classification level (e.g., XRF, Raman spectroscopy, FORS, IRR, X-radiography, optical microscopy). Provides a discovery-level term. Fuller procedural detail is recorded in the linked method or protocol document.
E55: Keywords
Subject or content keywords supporting discovery. May be drawn from a controlled vocabulary or entered as free text.
E30: Rights
The rights conditions applicable to this dataset.
E39: Rights Holder
E42: Licence URL
A URL pointing to the licence under which this dataset is made available (e.g., https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/). Preferred over a licence statement where a standard licence URL exists.
E73: Licence Statement
A free-text licence statement for cases where no standard licence URL is available. Use the Licence URL field in preference where possible.
E55: Access Status
The access status of this dataset. Drawn from a controlled list: open, restricted, embargoed.
E52: Embargo End Date
The date on which an embargo on this dataset expires and the dataset becomes available under its stated licence. Only applicable where Access Status is embargoed.
E54: Version Number
The version number of this dataset. Increment when a new version of the dataset is created. Version ordering is established by this number or by the creation date of the associated observation event.
E55: version number
